overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in power armor exploring a post-apocalyptic waterfront dock area. The character walks along metal platforms and concrete docks overlooking a harbor with ruined city buildings in the background, then stops to survey the view before turning to face an abandoned industrial building. The atmosphere is bleak and overcast with a grey-brown color palette typical of a devastated urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal platform with yellow railings overlooking harbor

agents.ego_description: walking down metal stairs and platform in heavy power armor, moving toward the concrete dock below

entered.detail: rusted metal grating stairs with yellow safety railings on both sides
yellow painted metal railings lining the platform edge
derelict white and orange camper trailer with faded paint
calm grey water of the harbor reflecting the overcast sky
distant skyline of damaged buildings and industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The character in power armor descends a metal platform with yellow railings overlooking a post-apocalyptic harbor. An abandoned camper trailer sits to the right while the ruined city skyline is visible across the water under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete waterfront dock edge with industrial buildings

events.description: steps off metal platform onto concrete dock surface
character stops walking at the dock edge to observe the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete dock edge overlooking the water, passing industrial structures

entered.detail: weathered concrete surface with cracks and debris
large abandoned building with classical columns and broken windows
metal pipe bridge spanning across the harbor view
partially submerged red boat wreckage in the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the concrete dock edge, leaving the metal platform behind. An imposing industrial building with columns appears on the left, while a sunken boat wreck floats in the water to the right. Overhead pipes frame the view of the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront observation point with panoramic harbor view

agents.ego_description: standing still at the dock edge, slowly panning the camera to survey the harbor and distant cityscape

entered.detail: white steam or smoke rising from structures in the far distance
tall twin art deco style towers with gold accents across the harbor

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary at the waterfront, panning the view across the harbor. The camera sweeps from the industrial building on the left toward the open water, revealing tall art deco towers and distant steam plumes across the bay. The overhead pipe structure moves to the left of the frame as the view opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial building courtyard with dead vegetation

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees to face the industrial building behind

agents.ego_description: turned around facing the abandoned industrial building, observing the desolate courtyard and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: massive derelict building with arched windows, ivy growth, and weathered stone facade
leafless dead trees in the courtyard between buildings
distant building with ominous red light emanating from windows
large deceased sea creature or fish lying on the concrete surface

segments.scene_description: The character turns around to face the abandoned industrial building, revealing a desolate courtyard with dead trees and a large deceased sea creature on the ground. The building shows signs of decay with ivy covering its facade, while a distant structure glows with red light from its windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a descent toward a bleak harbor and concludes with a turn toward a desolate industrial courtyard. It begins as the character in power armor descends a metal platform with yellow railings, passing an abandoned camper trailer while the ruined city skyline looms across the water. As the character moves onto the concrete dock, the view shifts to include an imposing industrial building on the left and a sunken boat wreck to the right, all framed by overhead pipes. The camera then pauses to pan across the harbor, sweeping from the industrial columns toward the open bay to reveal distant art deco towers and plumes of steam. Finally, the character turns away from the water to face the decaying industrial building, revealing a courtyard filled with dead trees, a massive deceased sea creature, and a distant structure glowing with red light.
